name: Getsu Fūma Den
description: Famicom action-adventure where Getsu Fūma crosses the underworld to defeat Ryūkotsuki.

backlog.reason: Interesting Konami Famicom action-adventure and historical predecessor to Undying Moon.

access.notes: Included in GetsuFumaDen: Undying Moon Deluxe Edition.

acquisition.notes: Owned digitally through GetsuFumaDen: Undying Moon Deluxe Edition.

notes: Original Japanese Famicom game included as a bonus with the Deluxe Edition.
